name: Colombia (presidential standard)

colors.symbolism: the upper band — the gold of Colombia and its sovereignty
the middle band — the two oceans bordering Colombia
the lower band — the blood spilt for independence

description: The Colombian national tricolour (a 2-1-1 horizontal triband of yellow, blue and red) defaced in the centre with the national coat of arms — a shield with pomegranate, cornucopias and Phrygian cap, flanked by four Colombian flags and surmounted by an Andean condor with an olive wreath and the motto LIBERTAD Y ORDEN.
history: The presidential standard adapts the national flag with the full national coat of arms as a personal flag of the President of Colombia as head of state and commander-in-chief.

features.role: Coat of arms of Colombia (full version, with condor, flags and motto scroll)
